mirakl_raw_field: Nested path from the parent order: Lengow → packages[].cart[]  |  ShoppingFeed → items[]  |  ChannelEngine → Lines[]  |  Mirakl → order_lines[]

notes: Only ChannelEngine provides excl-VAT unit price directly
Mirakl stores VAT in a taxes array; ChannelEngine exposes it directly on the line
Lengow and ShoppingFeed require client-side multiplication; CE and Mirakl have it directly
Only ChannelEngine exposes GTIN on the line item
ManoMano: commission / commission_amount / marketplace_commission on each product

section: PLATFORM-SPECIFIC LINE ITEM FIELDS — no canonical mapping (preserved in Order.raw)

notes: Internal line ID on each platform
Raw marketplace line status (before Lengow normalises)
Lengow feed the line belongs to
Lengow: category string; Mirakl: code and label separately
Mirakl platform (marketplace) product SKU (distinct from offer_sku)
Mirakl seller-set line description / delivery terms
Mirakl commission tax breakdown (canonical line commission uses total_commission or commission_fee)
ChannelEngine percentage fee on the line (FeeFixed is mapped to OrderItem.commission)
Mirakl promotions applied to the line
Mirakl operator-specific custom fields (e.g. vat-product-amount / vat-rate)
Mirakl price breakdown (commissionable / debitable / payable parts)
Mirakl product image URLs (media_url / type / mime_type)
Stock location (CE) or shipping origin address (Mirakl)
Per-line shipping deadline or delivery date
